records.description: Container lifecycle state and inspected metadata (running/created, labels, mounts, env).
Process exit status of the invoked command.
Contents of a file the command reads or writes.
Presence, absence, or attributes of files and directories on the workspace or container filesystem.
Built-image configuration and metadata (labels parsed semantically, environment, entrypoint).
Injected process context: environment, user, cwd, PATH resolution, signals, TTY, and exit propagation.
Container, network, volume, and mount graph produced by a run.
Bytes written to standard error (diagnostics, logs, progress).
Bytes written to standard output (the command result document).
Parsed structured (JSON) result document, distinct from the raw stdout bytes.
Lifecycle ordering, first-create versus restart, resume, and cleanup transitions across a run.
